nasb.text: But Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces that were with him heard of all the evil that Ishmael the son of Nethaniah had done.

esv.text: But when Johanan the son of Kareah and all the leaders of the forces with him heard of all the evil that Ishmael the son of Nethaniah had done,

cnv.text: 加利亞的兒子約哈難和與他一起的眾將領，聽見了尼探雅的兒子以實瑪利所行的一切惡事，

ccb.text: 加利亚的儿子约哈难和其他将领听说尼探雅的儿子以实玛利的所作所为，
